source_quote_under_280: The University of Pittsburgh School of Medicine's visiting student program is accepting applications through the VSLO. Students who have completed their core clinical training and will be in the fourth year of medical education at their LCME- or AOA- accredited home institution in North America may apply.
notes: VSLO required; 4th year only; LCME/AOA NA only.

source_quote_under_280: This program is ONLY for international students who have completed their core clinical training and are in their final year of medical education. This program does not offer observerships/externships to medical graduates.

source_type: Lincoln Emergency Medicine Residency MS3/4 Rotations page
source_quote_under_280: Hello! Thank you for your interest in rotating at Lincoln's Emergency Medicine Residency! Our rotation is 4 weeks long. You will be expected to see patients, formulate plans of care, and present them to our senior residents and attending physicians.
notes: Site-specific Lincoln EM rotation source; specialty-restricted to EM; audience accreditation/IMG/visa silent — must NOT broaden audience from this page.
